electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 32 Hz low-frequency limit (-10 dB, [SB118_100] preset); no upper limit published for the sub
electroacoustic.directivity: Omni-directional as a single element; an SB118 array can be configured as a cardioid sub with up to 10 dB of rear rejection
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 18-inch weather-resistant LF transducer loaded in a dual-vented (double bass-reflex) bandpass enclosure
electroacoustic.power_handling_note: Long-term RMS power handling 600 W ([SB118_100] preset)

operating_modes: HYBRID (SB118 plus ARCS or XT main driven from one controller)

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel for IN/LINK daisy-chaining
connection.wiring_note: Pins 1+/1- carry the LF signal; pins 2+/2- not used. Links to a second SB118 via SP.7 cable; feeds from LA4 via SP10/SP25, or from LA8 via DOSUB-LA8 with DO.7/DO10/DO25 cables

physical.cabinet: 18 and 24 mm Baltic birch plywood, Grey Brown RAL 8019 finish, polyester-coated steel grill, integrated handles
physical.weight_note: Owner's manual spec table lists 61 kg; the 2006 CE declaration lists 63 kg

modes: Stacked horizontal arrays (line-up, block, on-end, line-down)
Pole-mount base for a single XT enclosure on top
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Stacking runners and guides certified for up to 8 SB118 enclosures
rigging_accessories: Integrated stacking runners and runner guides
35 mm / 1.4 in pole-mount socket for an XT top

usage: Dedicated 18-inch subwoofer used to extend the low end of XT, KIVA, ARCS, dV-DOSC and similar L-Acoustics tops down to 32 Hz.
Each cabinet is 8 ohms and needs a single amp channel; an LA4 powers up to four SB118 (one per channel), while an LA8 handles up to eight (two paralleled per channel).
Choose the crossover by preset: the _100 presets cross at 100 Hz for XT/compact tops, the _60 presets at 60 Hz for larger systems, with _C variants for cardioid sub arrays.
Run STANDARD mode for omni coverage or CARDIOID mode (front-facing plus reverse-facing cabinets) to push low-frequency energy off the stage; cardioid gives roughly 10 dB of rear rejection.
HYBRID presets (ARCS_S118 / 8XT_SB118 / 12XTP_SB118) let one LA4 drive both the sub and the main tops, saving amp channels in small rigs.

Stack up to 8 cabinets per vertical column on the integrated runners (secure with appropriate hardware); a 35 mm socket on top accepts an XT pole mount, and the optional SB118PLA dolly aids transport.
source_manual: SB118 Owner's Manual / User Manual (EN), version 2.0
